hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','') or ''; reasons={'--no-verify':'Blocked: --no-verify bypasses pre-commit hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.','push --force':'Blocked: force push can destroy remote history. Use --force-with-lease if necessary.','push -f':'Blocked: force push can destroy remote history. Use --force-with-lease if necessary.'}; match=next((r for k,r in reasons.items() if k in c),None); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':match}})) if match else None"
